context: Evaluates the affordabot evidence sufficiency gate functions. Checks that assess_sufficiency() correctly classifies evidence into QUANTIFIED, QUALITATIVE_ONLY, and INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE states, and that strip_quantification() correctly downgrades responses.

checklist.name: QUANTIFIED state returned
checklist.description: assess_sufficiency() returns SufficiencyState.QUANTIFIED when evidence contains both fiscal keywords and quantified support indicators.

checklist.name: QUALITATIVE_ONLY state returned
checklist.description: assess_sufficiency() returns SufficiencyState.QUALITATIVE_ONLY when fiscal evidence is present but quantified support indicators are absent.

checklist.name: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE returned
checklist.description: assess_sufficiency() returns SufficiencyState.INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE when evidence lacks the required fiscal support keywords entirely.

checklist.name: strip_quantification removes bounds
checklist.description: strip_quantification() removes p50, p10, p90 values from all impacts and sets each impact mode to ImpactMode.QUALITATIVE_ONLY.

checklist.name: supports_quantified_evidence bool
checklist.description: supports_quantified_evidence() returns True only when evidence would yield QUANTIFIED state, consistent with assess_sufficiency().
